rules.name: collector.issue.permission
rules.title: Collector missing read access
rules.description: The audit identity cannot read a requested Microsoft 365 surface.

rules.name: collector.issue.service
rules.title: Collector blocked by tenant or service state
rules.description: The target service is missing, disabled, unavailable, or not provisioned for the tenant.

rules.name: sharepoint.broad_link
rules.title: Broad SharePoint or OneDrive sharing link
rules.description: A sharing link appears to grant access beyond a tightly bounded audience.

rules.name: app_consent.high_privilege
rules.title: Sensitive enterprise application consent
rules.description: An enterprise application grant has sensitive scopes or insufficient ownership evidence.

rules.name: response.blocked
rules.title: Response action guardrail stop
rules.description: A response action did not meet its safety or prerequisite gates.
